props.name: colors
props.description: Array of hex color stops used to build the velocity-to-color palette.

props.name: mouseForce
props.description: Strength multiplier applied to mouse / touch movement when injecting velocity.

props.name: cursorSize
props.description: Radius (in pixels at base resolution) of the force brush.

props.name: resolution
props.description: Simulation texture scale relative to canvas size (lower = better performance, more blur).

props.name: dt
props.description: Fixed simulation timestep used inside the advection / diffusion passes.

props.name: BFECC
props.description: Enable BFECC advection (error-compensated) for crisper flow; disable for slight performance gain.

props.name: isViscous
props.description: Toggle iterative viscosity solve (smoother, thicker motion when enabled).

props.name: viscous
props.description: Viscosity coefficient used when isViscous is true.

props.name: iterationsViscous
props.description: Number of Gauss-Seidel iterations for viscosity (higher = smoother, slower).

props.name: iterationsPoisson
props.description: Number of pressure Poisson iterations to enforce incompressibility.

props.name: isBounce
props.description: If true, shows bounce boundaries (velocity clamped at edges).

props.name: autoDemo
props.description: Enable idle auto-driving of the pointer when no user interaction.

props.name: autoSpeed
props.description: Speed (normalized units/sec) for auto pointer motion.

props.name: autoIntensity
props.description: Multiplier applied to velocity delta while in auto mode.

props.name: takeoverDuration
props.description: Seconds to interpolate from auto pointer to real cursor when user moves mouse.

props.name: autoResumeDelay
props.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before auto mode resumes.

props.name: autoRampDuration
props.description: Seconds to ramp auto movement speed from 0 to full after activation.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional class for the root container.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the root container.
